name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Excessive File Modifications
notes: This Building Block detects excessive file modifications within a short duration.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Excessive File Modifications on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System

when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Successful File Modification, Audit.Update Activity Attempted, Audit.Update Activity Succeeded, Audit.Object Access Attempt, Audit.Object Access Success
when at least 20 events are seen with the same Machine Identifier (custom) and different Filename (custom) in 1 hour(s)
thresholds: when at least 20 events are seen with the same Machine Identifier (custom) and different Filename (custom) in 1 hour(s)
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Excessive File Modifications on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System

AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Successful File Modification, Audit.Update Activity Attempted, Audit.Update Activity Succeeded, Audit.Object Access Attempt, Audit.Object Access Success
AND when at least 20 events are seen with the same Machine Identifier (custom) and different Filename (custom) in 1 hour(s)
